caption: The video depicts a medical simulation scenario taking place in a hospital setting, likely during a training exercise for healthcare professionals. A group of medical staff, dressed in pink scrubs and wearing masks, is gathered around a patient lying on a hospital bed. The patient appears to be a mannequin used for training purposes, as indicated by the "Sim Week" logo in the corner. One nurse is actively using a device, possibly an otoscope or similar medical instrument, while others observe closely. The atmosphere is focused and professional, with participants engaged in the simulation to practice their skills and procedures. The scene captures the collaborative effort of the medical team as they work through the simulated patient care scenario.
